description_long: This object is a medium-sized potted plant featuring broad, dark green leaves and clusters of pale pink flowers with yellow centers. The plant is housed in a simple, faceted cylindrical pot with a matte gray finish and no visible decorative elements. The leaves are arranged in two main tiers, with the upper tier slightly elevated above the lower, creating a layered appearance. The flowers are distributed among the leaves, adding a touch of color and visual interest. The pot appears to be made of plastic or ceramic, and the plant is likely artificial given the stylized, low-polygon look of the foliage and flowers. This type of potted plant would commonly be found in urban environments such as offices, lobbies, or on sidewalks outside businesses.
description: A medium-sized potted plant with broad green leaves and clusters of pale pink flowers in a plain, faceted gray pot. The plant has a layered leaf arrangement and a simple, modern appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing both flower clusters and the layered arrangement of broad green leaves in a plain gray pot.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the lower flower cluster and the angled spread of the leaves, with the pot's faceted shape visible.
description_view_2: Rear angled view showing the upper flower cluster more prominently and the pot's open top with visible soil.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the upper flower cluster and the overlapping leaves, with the pot's shadowed side.
